item.title: Making moves...
item.description: I have been working the night shift Walmart for 8 years now and when I asked to move to the morning shift they kept declining me and I can't do it anymore. I hope that I can get a replacement job soon.
item.dc:creator: PandaManJebJeb

item.title: The craziest thing I've ever seen a Manatee do
item.description: I've seen Manatees do some strange or crazy things over the years. This was a group of 3 manatees that were following me as I was trying to back away. They followed me like this for about half a mile. At one point, one of them got right under the kayak and rolled over twice while in motion. I didn't even know a Manatee was capable of doing that while moving forward. I was pretty psyched when National Geographic purchased a copy of the video from me. I think it was the first video I ever sold to Nat Geo. All of the pics and videos I post are taken by me. For more OC nature vids check out my gallery at https://imgur.com/user/SeeThroughCanoe/posts or look for See Through Canoe Company on YouTube & other social media sites.
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe

item.title: First vacation in 15 years and decided to go to Croatia!
item.description:
The flight over Canada.
The airport in Zadar.
The pier near my hostel.
A cool old boat. This one has a lot of steel on it, most of them are fiberglass.
City center
An old church.
Pondering the shell
Love these old alleys Edit: most viral thanks guys! Any tips on how to stop sweating? I’m from Alaska and the temperature here is killing me.
item.dc:creator: Lurch1911

item.title: Trying hard on Etsy
item.description: Hello everyone! Each time i write a post like this, one part of me dies, but often (more than i would like) it's my only chance. I have an Etsy shop, unfortunately not a successful one, but from time to time, one of my posts become viral and then i can pay my rent and bills. Sadly i burnt every single way before posting this. Due my cronical disease condition, nobody hires me, this is just for the people that write things like "get a real job". Well, i wish i could. Anyway, each of my dolls requires lot of time and effort, this is for me an absolut real job and i put all my soul in each creation. So please... if you could help me and make this viral together, i would really appreciate it. You're my only chance, i'm getting asfixiated by the debts and i can't handle it anymore. Here's my Etsy shop, I also accept custom orders https://geekgurumis.etsy.com Maybe you'll find the perfect quirky gift! I have added a discount code: IMGUR10 Thanks, and have a wonderful weekend
item.dc:creator: GeekGurumis

item.title: Baldwin case dismissed.
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/alec-baldwin-rust-shooting-hutchins-eb3059c696a9aee5cb86967e27d8f3bb Case dismissed with prejudice based on prosecution withholding evidence from the defense. Case cannot be refiled. The entire situation was very sad, but in my heart of hearts, having come from a family of actors, I feel like this was the right decision. Most viral edit: Make sure you are registered to vote. Let no one tell you that you cannot. Check out ballotpedia.org for valuable information on the upcoming election including what your ballot will look like. Vote blue at every possible level, up and down the ballot, even if you don't agree with some of the positions of your democratic candidates. We must absolutely make sure that the orange Pig anus is not once again in the White House, and that project 2025 is never implemented.
item.dc:creator: AyatollahBahloni

item.title: Starting the weekend off right with a nice Saturday dump
item.description:
I always ask my wife if she wants to hate me when I put something big in my pockets. Last weekend was comic con. I carried a whole-ass nalgene bottle in one of my pockets.
I need to get me a sword. Good thing ren faire is next weekend.
Idk, it was 105° yesterday and I sure as hell didn't feel like committing any crimes that didn't involve cold showers and AC.
That's the great thing about lazy coworkers: they make the rest of us look really good by comparison.
These are the kind of things they don't teach you in American history classes.
I'd go to this wedding in a heartbeat.
Merry Christmas in July, everyone
Ziti the Kenyan sand boa tax. Thank you all for stopping by, and I hope you enjoyed or suffered appropriately.
item.dc:creator: RomeoZeroRomeo

item.title: I saw something beautiful today
item.description: I work in air traffic radar at a military base. We had a tour of civilians come through at the end of the day while we were closed for military ops while preparing for an air show (still had other flights in our air space that we had to work though). My coworker was the only woman still on the shift and was actively working air craft during the tour which was only about 14 civilians. When the tour was over and the group was leaving, a mother with her young daughter who couldn't have been older than 8, walked over to my coworker and said "my daughter said she's really excited to see a girl here". My coworker is only 21, I'm a bit older and have 3 kids 2 of them are girls and this made both of us tear up a bit. My coworker couldn't stop smiling for the next 20 minutes, I told her "that little girl will probably grow up to be a controller now because of you." Any way, end of story, was just something super wonderful I saw and wanted to share.
item.dc:creator: CandyPlanetJumper
